creator: madpilot@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi,

Thanks for your patches.

I am attaching a revised patch.

Please note that when updating PORTVERSION, PORTREVISION should be reset.

Also, I noticed that the "FETCH_ARGS=-Fpr" is not needed anymore. The 
port fetches successfully also without it.

While here I also updated the port to use the new options framework.

I added explicit options for DOCS and NLS, since the port has support 
for them.

Thanks again for your time and work.

-- 
Guido Falsi <madpilot@FreeBSD.org>
